final_explanation:
Based on the AI model's prediction,
The fact that the applicant has no known savings, because lower savings are linked to higher credit risk, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [1]
The fact that the applicant has no checking account, because lacking a checking account is linked to lower credit risk, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that increases risk. [2]
The fact that the applicant has very low savings, because its impact on credit risk cannot be established, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [3]
Overall, this applicant is likely to have a low risk of default.

final_explanation_ko:
본 AI가 예측한 결과에 따르면,\n계좌 잔액 부족은 신용 위험을 증가시키는 신호로 알려져 있지만, 본 모델은 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 판단합니다 [1].
입출금 계좌 없음은 일반적으로 신용 위험을 낮추는 요인으로 인식되지만, 본 모델은 이를 위험 증가 요인으로 해석합니다 [2].
저축 잔액이 거의 없는 경우는 신용 위험 감소 요인으로 여겨지지만, 본 모델은 이 요인을 위험 감소 요인으로도 평가합니다 [3].
전반적으로 신용 위험이 낮은 수준으로 평가되어 대출 승인 가능성이 높습니다.
